title: GreatCool 62" Car Wash Brush Kit With Super Long Handle, 2 in 1 Chenille Microfiber Car Wash Mop Cleaning Mitt Suitable for Washing Cars Truck SUV RV Caravans and Household, Scratch Free(2 x Mop Head)
features: 【2 x Mop Heads + 1 x Assembled Aluminum Alloy Pole】-Get 2 x chenille microfibre mop head and 1 x 160 cm aluminium rod. It can be washed by hand and the car mops head can be easily replaced. The design with easy assembly and disassembly allows you to put the mop in a storage bag measuring 45 cm long x 23 cm wide. Therefore, the car brush head is easy to carry, use and store.

【Car Wash Mop With 62 inch Super-Long Handle】-The super long car washing brush helps you clean places at different heights that you can't reach by hand, such as the roof of the car. The caravan cleaning brush is made of aluminium alloy, which is harder than stainless steel and lighter and has a longer service life. It can be extended to 160 cm so you can easily perform a complete clean.

【180°Rotation Multi-Angle Cleaning】-180 degree rotation with multi-angle cleaning: the lightweight car cleaning brush has a non-slip handle so you can hold it in place. It also has a 180 degree adjustable mop head that allows you to easily clean different angles without bending. The handle length can be adjusted manually to meet your different daily needs.

【Not Hurt Paint And Scrach Free】 -The car wash mops head is made of high-quality chenille microfibre, which is absorbent and very decontaminable. The caravan brush is ultra soft, scratch, lint, streak and swirl free, and can remove dust, dirt and foam easier and faster without scratching the paint, coating, glass or any surface. Let it give your car a new look!

【Wide Application】-The car wash brush with long handle is multifunctional. It is very suitable for washing, drying, waxing, dusting and polishing cars, trucks, SUVs, buses, motorcycles or caravans. In addition, the car wash mop head can be used as a cloth or home mop to clean glass windows, floors, exterior sheds, boats, furniture, etc.
description: Product Description Features 2 x Mop Head You can get 2 x mop heads and you'll save money better and feel moer practical! It is hand washable and easy to replace. Humanized Design & 62'' Using the 60" car washing mops with long handle, you can easily clean the top of the car without straining your back and getting wet. Designed for cars, trucks, SUVs, and RVs,suitable for all people, including women and children. 2-in-1 Design Ideal duster for car for interior and exterior.Easily disassemble the chenille and use it as a mitt to clean the interior of the car.Easily assemble the chenille, turn it into a long mop, and clean the exterior of the car. Chenille Microfiber Super thick, ultra absorbent.Anti-scratch microfiber mop.You won't be left with lint, scratches or swirls! Multi-Purpose This car cleaning kit could also be used to clean your home accessories,Truck, Motorcycle, SUV, RV or Boat! Use it on any surface! Specification / Package Include / Manual Material Fine chenille microfibers, Aluminum alloy handle Dimension 62”L /160CM(Can be shortened to 18,5"/47CM, 32"/82CM, and 45,7"/116CM) Package Include 2 x Mop Heads + 1 x Assembled Aluminum Alloy Pole Manual-Step1 1.Easily remove the mop head and use it as a mitt to clean the interior of the car. Manual-Step2 2. Use a mop to absorb soap and water，then gently sweep the surface of dust and dirt directly on the paint surface to remove dust. Manual-Step3 3.After mop head becomes soiled, you just need to wash it by hand in the bucket or rinse under the faucet for multiple uses,and make sure to remove all sand or hard granules,finally placed in a cool and ventilated place to dry.
